descriptionShort: Centennial Cup tournament coverage: Humboldt defeats Pembroke 4-2 with Ryhorchuk's tip-in goal; Richmond Sockeyes beat Dartmouth 7-3.
descriptionLong: At the Centennial Cup tournament in Humboldt, Duncan Ryhorchuk's tipped point shot gave the host Broncos a 4-2 victory over Pembroke to secure a playoff spot. Coach Bernie Lynch praised Ryhorchuk as a hardworking "grinder" type player. Richmond Sockeyes defeated Dartmouth Fuel Kids 7-3 on Sunday, following Humboldt's 7-2 win over Dartmouth on Saturday.

attribution.headline: Ryhorchuk's Goal Helps Humboldt Past Pembroke
